checks.detail: No GitHub Actions dependency context was provided; local metadata checks only.
Not enforcing for local metadata run. Candidate status: BLOCKED; blockers: 1.

checks.label: Setup Command Center is the default guided entry point.
checks.proof: Playwright web/Electron smoke lands first-run users in the guided command center.
checks.detail: Playwright web/Electron smoke lands first-run users in the guided command center.

checks.label: Auto Detect tells the user what is present, what is active, and what is conflicting.
checks.proof: Normalized report, chain graph, confidence, risks, and next actions render from browser plus bridge evidence.
checks.detail: Normalized report, chain graph, confidence, risks, and next actions render from browser plus bridge evidence.

checks.label: Windows desktop shell can run a native scan and safely read the bridge report.
checks.proof: Electron preload exposes only approved helper APIs and reads reports without changing system state.
checks.detail: Electron preload exposes only approved helper APIs and reads reports without changing system state.

checks.label: Web build and Electron build both pass smoke automation.
checks.proof: Playwright web smoke, Playwright Electron smoke, and packaged desktop smoke pass.
checks.detail: Playwright web smoke, Playwright Electron smoke, and packaged desktop smoke pass.

checks.label: At least one real Windows loopback regression run passes.
checks.proof: A Windows endpoint loopback run, not only the deterministic fixture policy, proves cue lift, loudness, phase, and no clipping on real hardware.
checks.detail: At least one real Windows loopback regression run passes. Missing proof key: realWindowsLoopbackRegressionPassed.

checks.label: Redacted reports contain no raw device IDs, usernames, local paths, emails, or phone numbers.
checks.proof: Privacy audit, export redaction checks, report packs, setup packs, and evidence packets stay sanitized.
checks.detail: Privacy audit, export redaction checks, report packs, setup packs, and evidence packets stay sanitized.

checks.label: APO draft export is explicit and reversible.
checks.proof: CueForge saves reviewed APO drafts only after user action and keeps real APO/system writes out of automatic flows.
checks.detail: CueForge saves reviewed APO drafts only after user action and keeps real APO/system writes out of automatic flows.

checks.label: Conflict rules catch the common messy Windows stacks.
checks.proof: Rules cover APO + Sonar, Sonar + Discord effects, Voicemeeter loop/echo risk, and wrong default communications endpoint.
checks.detail: Rules cover APO + Sonar, Sonar + Discord effects, Voicemeeter loop/echo risk, and wrong default communications endpoint.

checks.label: Player-trial and audio-evidence packets stay local by default.
checks.proof: Packets export locally with opt-in sharing and summary metrics by default.
checks.detail: Packets export locally with opt-in sharing and summary metrics by default.

checks.label: Build metadata is visible enough to detect stale deploys.
checks.proof: Version metadata is checked in release readiness, release packs, and acceptance docs.
checks.detail: Version metadata is checked in release readiness, release packs, and acceptance docs.

checks.label: Release notes explain the Windows-first boundary and avoid arbitrary-game occlusion promises.
checks.proof: Release copy states the Windows-first chain-verification boundary and does not promise engine-level occlusion for arbitrary games.
checks.detail: Release copy states the Windows-first chain-verification boundary and does not promise engine-level occlusion for arbitrary games.
